results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Double-count + non-state + forward-trigger. WFP imminent-cuts warning and record 35M+ food-insecure continue the already-priced June crossing; insurgent (JNIM/ISWAP) attacks are non-state; the WFP funding gap is not state obstruction; formal IPC Phase 5 in Borno remains a forward trigger. Confirm 18.0.

results.name: China
results.key_finding: Double-count + forward-trigger. Ethnic Unity Law (in force Day 6) codifies already-priced assimilation policy plus an Article 63 extraterritorial legal claim; no documented Article 63 enforcement action yet; Germany/Taiwan concern is third-party. Marginal within-band dock does not clear threshold. Confirm 19.5.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Attribution + non-state. The Jul 6 IDF car strike (4 killed, Nabatieh) and wave of southern strikes are Israel's conduct; Hezbollah is non-state; an unrealized ceasefire is not positive evidence. No new Lebanese-state own conduct. Confirm 17.2.

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Exogenous-disaster screen. Day-12 quake (3,300+ dead, 50k+ unaccounted) is a natural event; only the state response is scorable. Rising toll is scale/disclosure; chronic data opacity already priced; the $200M fund covering <1% is context but aid acceptance blocks a downgrade; any falsification claim is a forward trigger. Confirm 18.0.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Attribution (other state). The Jul 5-6 Kyiv strikes (15+ killed), Dnipro (17 killed) and 170/day July toll are RUSSIA's conduct, scored against Russia (0.0). Harm by another state cannot downgrade the victim; Ukraine's civilian-protection response is band-consistent. Confirm 50.0.

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: Non-state + double-count + calibration flag. The JNIM fuel blockade of Bamako and Jul 4 coordinated attacks are non-state; ~5M-in-need/18.5%-funded continue the priced crisis; HRW Jun 28 abuses report reflects the priced arc. OPEN Sahel-band calibration (Mali 12.5 vs Burkina Faso 6.3) carried to coordinator, not an assessor one-off. Confirm 12.5.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor-limitation. 7.8M food-insecure, 73,300 at IPC Phase 5 (up 160%), famine risk in 4 counties reinforce but cannot lower an existing 0.0 floor; Ebola cross-border spillover is exogenous; no positive countervailing state conduct. Confirm 0.0.

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Pre-adjudication. The DOJ criminal probe now extends to Optum Rx / physician reimbursement and a civil MA-inflation probe continues; neither is decided in court. The Grassley 'gaming' finding is already priced; the June sector takedown is context. Confirm 10.2; forward trigger = indictment/ruling/settlement (Q2 earnings Jul 29).

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor + non-state. Al Jazeera Jul 6 'next el-Fasher?', Amnesty Jul 1 crimes-against-humanity report, and the UN Jul 3 session document RSF (non-state) atrocities at El Obeid. Reinforces but cannot lower an existing 0.0 floor. Confirm 0.0.

results.name: Palestine
results.key_finding: Attribution + directionality. The Jul 6 killing of 6 Palestinians is Israel's conduct (scored against Israel). Hamas's announced dissolution of its Gaza government is an unrealized/procedural handover (committee still outside Gaza; called 'a spin' with members staying in position) — not verified positive own-conduct. Absence of new own-harm is not an upgrade. Confirm 25.0.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Near-floor own-conduct (bounded) + double-count. Khamenei funeral/burial and paused talks are procedural; 141 June executions and the Fallahi death sentence (Jul 1) are Iran's own conduct but continue the already-priced execution pattern (784+ YTD, 37-year high). A single sentence does not clear a fresh threshold toward the floor. Confirm 2.5.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Floor + realized harm attributed HERE. The Jul 5-6 Kyiv strikes (15+ killed) and Dnipro (17 killed) are Russia's own conduct, scored against Russia; the EU crime-of-aggression Special Tribunal is operational; 20,500+ children deported. Already at 0.0; reinforcing evidence cannot lower the floor. Confirm 0.0.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Own-conduct + floor-limitation. The Jul 6 al-Mawasi drone strike on displaced people and the Lebanon car strike are Israel's own realized conduct (the perpetrator), correctly scored here. Israel is already at the 0.0 floor and cannot go lower. Confirm floor 0.0.

results.name: Democratic Republic of C
results.key_finding: Exogenous-disease + near-floor + attribution. WHO Jul 6 Ebola count (1,561/506, accelerating) is an exogenous outbreak scored on response; limited international spread contained; M23 conflict harm attributes to Rwanda-backed forces. Reinforces but cannot meaningfully lower 2.3. Confirm 2.3.

results.name: Haiti
results.key_finding: Attribution (other-state + non-state) + near-floor. The Jul 10 TPS work-authorization expiration for ~350k Haitians is US conduct (SCOTUS Mullin v. Doe); gang control of ~90% of Port-au-Prince is non-state; 5.8M food-insecure / 1.5M displaced continue the priced collapse. No fresh Haitian-state own-conduct event. Confirm 4.7.

false_positives_screened.screened: Record lean-season hunger (35M+) continues the already-priced June crossing; insurgent attacks are non-state; the WFP funding gap is not state obstruction; formal IPC Phase 5 in Borno remains a forward trigger. Confirm 18.0.

Ethnic Unity Law (in force Day 6) codifies already-priced assimilation/transnational-repression policy; Article 63 remains a stated legal claim with no documented extraterritorial enforcement action; Germany/Taiwan concern is third-party. Confirm 19.5.
The Jul 6 IDF car strike and wave of southern strikes are Israel's conduct; Hezbollah is non-state; an unrealized ceasefire is not positive evidence; no new Lebanese-state own conduct. Confirm 17.2.

Day-12 quake is exogenous; rising toll is scale/disclosure; data opacity already priced; the $200M fund covering <1% is context and aid acceptance blocks a downgrade; a single-source falsification claim is a forward trigger. Confirm 18.0.

The Jul 5-6 Kyiv/Dnipro strikes and 170/day July toll are Russia's conduct, scored against Russia (0.0). Harm by another state cannot yield a downgrade of the victim; sheltering response band-consistent. Confirm 50.0.

JNIM Bamako blockade and Jul 4 attacks are non-state; need/funding figures continue the priced crisis; HRW Jun 28 report reflects the priced arc; Sahel-band calibration vs Burkina Faso carried to coordinator, not an assessor one-off. Confirm 12.5.
Famine risk / 73,300 Phase 5 reinforce but cannot lower an existing 0.0 floor; Ebola spillover is exogenous; no positive countervailing state conduct. Confirm 0.0.
DOJ criminal (Optum Rx) and civil MA-inflation probes are not yet decided in court; the June sector takedown is context; the Grassley 'gaming' finding is already priced. Confirm 10.2.
RSF El Obeid siege and El Fasher/North Darfur atrocities are RSF (non-state) conduct; already at 0.0 floor. Reinforces, cannot lower. Confirm 0.0.

The Jul 6 killing of 6 Palestinians is Israel's conduct, scored against Israel. Hamas's announced government dissolution is an unrealized/procedural handover (committee still outside Gaza), not verified positive own-conduct; absence of new own-harm is not an upgrade signal. Confirm 25.0.

Funeral and paused talks are procedural; June executions and the Fallahi death sentence are own conduct but continue the already-priced execution pattern; a single sentence does not clear a fresh threshold. Confirm 2.5.
Jul 5-6 Kyiv/Dnipro strikes scored against Russia; already at 0.0 floor; EU Special Tribunal reinforces. Cannot lower. Confirm 0.0.

false_positives_screened.rule: 3e-bis floor-limitation (own conduct, perpetrator, already at floor)
false_positives_screened.screened: The Jul 6 al-Mawasi drone strike and Lebanon car strike are Israel's own realized conduct, correctly scored here; Israel is already at the 0.0 floor and cannot go lower. Confirm floor 0.0.

The accelerating Ebola outbreak (1,561/506) with limited contained international spread is exogenous (score response); M23 harm attributes to Rwanda-backed forces. Reinforces but cannot meaningfully lower 2.3. Confirm 2.3.

The Jul 10 TPS termination is US conduct; gang control of ~90% of Port-au-Prince is non-state; food-insecurity/displacement collapse is already priced. No fresh Haitian-state own-conduct event; near-floor downside bounded. Confirm 4.7.

sahel_calibration_status: OPEN - coordinator-level Sahel-band reweight review carried forward (Mali 12.5 vs Burkina Faso 6.3). Mali confirmed at published baseline; no assessor one-off (3e-bis(5)). Burkina Faso not in today's assessment set.

math_hygiene.note: No score changes today; all 15 are confirmations at live-index baselines from countries.json/fortune-500.json. No recomputation on changed dimensions; no math-hygiene discrepancies.

rotation_state_integrity: For all 15 entities, rotation-state composite/band mirror PUBLISHED index values; only last_assessed/last_scanned/last_evidence_touch timestamps updated. Four pre-existing RANK drifts (from the 2026-07-05 El Salvador apply not fully propagating ranks) corrected TO PUBLISHED: china 148->147, nigeria 150->149, venezuela 151->150, lebanon 153->152. Composites/bands were already correct. last_change_proposal fields left unchanged. No proposed/unapplied values written to rotation-state.
forward_triggers_logged: Nigeria: formal IPC Phase 5 famine declaration in Borno or documented deliberate state aid obstruction = downgrade.
China: first documented Article 63 extraterritorial enforcement action = downgrade.
Lebanon: implemented civilian-protecting ceasefire with the state extending governance/relief to the south = upgrade.
Venezuela: independently verified falsification/suppression of death data or deliberate relief obstruction = downgrade; transparent equitable relief scale-up = upgrade.
Ukraine: documented Ukrainian-state failure to protect / discriminatory relief = downgrade; verified equitable civilian-protection scale-up = upgrade.
Mali/Burkina Faso: state-perpetrated civilian violence or siege expansion = downgrade; aid-access + NGO-space restoration = upgrade.
South Sudan: verified state-led equitable relief scale-up and civilian protection = upgrade.
UnitedHealth: DOJ complaint/indictment/ruling/settlement/admitted findings = downgrade (watch Q2 earnings Jul 29).
Sudan: verified state-led civilian protection and equitable relief access = upgrade.

Palestine: independently documented Palestinian-authority deliberate targeting of, or systematic aid diversion from, its own civilians = downgrade; verified equitable civilian-protection/relief scale-up actually implemented under Palestinian control = upgrade.
Iran: documented succession-linked mass repression / lethal crackdown = downgrade; due-process restoration / prisoner release = upgrade.
Russia: cessation of attacks on civilians, return of deported children, cooperation with accountability = upgrade.
Israel: verified halt of strikes on civilians, restoration of humanitarian access, withdrawal from occupied areas = upgrade.
DRC: collapse/obstruction of Ebola response = downgrade; verified containment scale-up = upgrade.
Haiti: documented Haitian-state security-force atrocities or deliberate relief obstruction = downgrade; verified state-led civilian protection/relief restoration = upgrade.
